meaning: adj.震撼全球的,极为重大的,翻天覆地的
examples: Such an earthshaking change must have far-reaching effects.
You earthshaking changes have taken place.
Earthshaking fire from the center of the earth.
Is this an earthshaking development that says something fundamental has changed about mainland investors, or that the wall is coming down between valuations on the mainland and the rest of the world?
